[cron:ed08c32f-6c5c-4300-b0fd-e1cd974735fc 国际机票推送] 请执行以下步骤推送国际机票日报：
1. 运行 exec: python C:\ADHD_agent\openclaw\workspace\ctrip_tracker.py --direct
2. 读取脚本的控制台输出作为推送文案
3. 读取 C:\ADHD_agent\openclaw\workspace\uploads\flight_trend.png 作为趋势图
4. 把文案和趋势图一起发送到飞书
Current time: Thursday, April 9th, 2026 — 11:10 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-09 03:10 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Let me execute the steps as requested. First, I'll run the ctrip_tracker.py script with the --direct flag.
The script ran successfully. The push text is ready and the trend chart was generated. The results show no direct flight data for the next 2-3 months. Let me read the trend chart image.
The script already sent the message and image to Feishu (as indicated by "飞书文字推送成功" and "飞书趋势图推送成功"). The task is complete. I just need to summarize what happened.
